title: FedRAMP Certification Package Overview (FRC-CSO-PKG)
description: Identification, service properties, contacts, and supporting documentation for a Cloud Service Offering per FRC-CSO-PKG.

serviceIdentification.title: Service Identification
serviceIdentification.description: Basic identification details for the Cloud Service Offering.

fedRampPackageId.title: FedRAMP ID
fedRampPackageId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the CSP by FedRAMP. If no FedRAMP ID is available, use the CSP's name and acronym.

ueiNumber.title: UEI Number
ueiNumber.description: Unique Entity Identifier (UEI) assigned to the CSP by SAM.gov. If no UEI is available leave this blank. (CDS-CSO-PUB)

providerName.title: Provider Name
providerName.description: Name of the Cloud Service Provider.

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Full name of the Cloud Service Offering.

serviceAcronym.title: Service Acronym
serviceAcronym.description: Short acronym or abbreviation for the Cloud Service Offering.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.description: A detailed description of the Cloud Service Offering. May use Markdown for formatting (CDS-CSO-PUB).

certificationType.title: Certification Type
certificationType.description: The FedRAMP certification type for the Cloud Service Offering.

website.title: Website
website.description: Official website for the Cloud Service Offering (CDS-CSO-PUB).

logo.title: Logo
logo.description: URL of the CSP logo. Must point to a PNG, JPEG, GIF, SVG, WebP, ICO, BMP, or TIFF file (CDS-CSO-PUB).

serviceProperties.title: Service Properties
serviceProperties.description: Technical and operational properties of the Cloud Service Offering.

serviceType.title: Service Model
serviceType.description: Cloud service model(s). Select all that apply (CDS-CSO-PUB).

businessCategory.title: Business Category
businessCategory.description: Business Category(s) supported by the service (CDS-CSO-PUB).

trustCenter.title: Trust Center
trustCenter.description: The URL and any access instructions needed for the Cloud Service Providers FedRAMP Trust Center (CDS-CSO-UTC). Note: Rules for FedRAMP-Compatible Trust Centers are explained in the Certification Data Sharing Rules under the FedRAMP-Compatible Trust Centers section (id: CDS-TRC).

secureConfigurationGuidance.title: Secure Configuration Guidance
secureConfigurationGuidance.description: The URL and any access instructions needed for the Cloud Service Providers Secure Configuration Guide (SCG-CSO-RSC)

additionalRepositories.title: Repositories
additionalRepositories.description: Repository locations for system authorization documentation, policies, procedures, and assessment reports.

nextOngoingCertificationReportDate.title: Next Ongoing Certification Report Date
nextOngoingCertificationReportDate.description: The date of the next ongoing certification report for the Cloud Service Provider (CDS-CSO-PUB).

contactInformation.title: Contact Information
contactInformation.description: Key contacts for the Cloud Service Provider. Must include at least one Security Contact and one Sales Contact (CDS-CSO-PUB).

assessor.title: Independent Assessor
assessor.description: The Independent Assessment Service that performs verification and validation for the Cloud Service Offering (CDS-CSO-PUB).

assessorID.title: Assessor's FedRAMP ID
assessorID.description: Unique identifier assigned to the assessor by FedRAMP.

certifiedServices.title: Certified Services
certifiedServices.description: List of services offered by the provider that are included in this certification (CDS-CSO-SVC).

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Name of the service as it appears on the provider's website and in marketing materials.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.description: Description of the service. May use Markdown for formatting.

dateAvailable.title: Date Available
dateAvailable.description: Date the service became available or was certified.

thirdPartyInformationResources.title: Third-Party Information Resources
thirdPartyInformationResources.description: Third-party information resources within the Minimum Assessment Scope for the Cloud Service Offering (MAS-CSO-TPR).

fedRampCertifiedThirdPartyInformationRes.title: FedRAMP ID
fedRampCertifiedThirdPartyInformationRes.description: Unique FedRAMP ID of the third-party information resource.

useCase.title: Use Case
useCase.description: How this resource is used in the context of this offering.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the third-party information resource.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Name of the provider of the third-party information resource.

website.title: Website
website.description: Website of the third-party information resource.

useCase.title: Use Case
useCase.description: How this resource is used in the context of this offering.

repositoryType.title: Repository Type
repositoryType.description: The type(s) or categories of this repository. A single repository may satisfy multiple type requirements.

authenticationRequired.title: Authentication Required
authenticationRequired.description: Whether authentication is required to access the repository.

accessRequestInstructions.title: Access Request Instructions
accessRequestInstructions.description: Instructions for requesting access to the repository. May use Markdown for formatting.

contactType.title: Contact Type
contactType.description: The role or category of this contact.
